title: Actinocephalus cipoensis
taxonomy: Actinocephalus cipoensis is a species of plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. It belongs to the genus Actinocephalus, which is a group of plants commonly known as "pipiás" or "pipis" in Brazil. The family Eriocaulaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Actinocephalus cipoensis is native to Brazil, a country with a vast array of plant species. The classification of Actinocephalus cipoensis is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae) and class (Liliopsida).
